content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be redesigned to gate memory storage and retrieval based on the intrinsic reward signal generated by curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND, rather than just prediction error or task importance. This creates a self-reinforcing 'curiosity memory loop' where an agent prioritizes storing surprising, uncertain experiences that drive further curiosity, rather than just storing data that improves immediate task performance.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
